local_validation.summary: Current attention drift was narrowed and proved locally. Fresh substrate ingestion brings the worktree KB audit to 142/142 concept cells with no missing/stale/path drift. Wellness now reports aligned indexes, source maps, symbol resolution, locale parity across 1738 keys and 4 tongues, and whole chain reach. The three specs that claimed missing tests now have focused proof files; timeout resume now emits the RESUME FROM TIMEOUT marker and exposes sample, metric, and recommendation routes. Deployment status now reflects the current verified public API/web domains while preserving the legacy Railway dead URL as historical drift. Web dependency drift was partially remediated with non-forced npm audit fix; remaining findings are moderate wallet/Next transitive issues requiring semver-major remediation.
